context: Tests whether the agent uses the correct WooCommerce SlotFill pattern (registerPlugin with scope and ExperimentalOrderMeta), reads cart data via the correct store and hook, and imports from the right WordPress packages. Covers SlotFill injection, CART_STORE_KEY usage, and scope requirement.

checklist.name: registerPlugin usage
checklist.description: frontend.js calls registerPlugin() imported from @wordpress/plugins (not a custom event listener or direct DOM manipulation)

checklist.name: scope: woocommerce-checkout
checklist.description: registerPlugin call includes scope: "woocommerce-checkout" as a property (the exact string)

checklist.name: ExperimentalOrderMeta slot
checklist.description: The plugin render function wraps content in ExperimentalOrderMeta (or another named WooCommerce SlotFill component from @woocommerce/blocks-checkout), not a plain React Fragment or arbitrary div

checklist.name: ExperimentalOrderMeta import source
checklist.description: ExperimentalOrderMeta (or the chosen SlotFill component) is imported from @woocommerce/blocks-checkout

checklist.name: useSelect for cart data
checklist.description: Cart total is read using useSelect() from @wordpress/data, not via fetch/REST API call or window.wc globals

checklist.name: CART_STORE_KEY usage
checklist.description: useSelect passes CART_STORE_KEY imported from @woocommerce/block-data as the store key (not a hard-coded string like 'wc/store/cart')

checklist.name: @wordpress/element imports
checklist.description: Any React hooks or JSX helpers used (e.g. useState, useEffect) are imported from @wordpress/element, not from 'react'

checklist.name: @woocommerce/block-data script dependency
checklist.description: plugin-loader.php includes 'wc-blocks-data-store' or '@woocommerce/block-data' equivalent as a script dependency in wp_register_script or wp_enqueue_script

checklist.name: Banner conditional rendering
checklist.description: Banner component returns null or nothing when the cart total meets or exceeds the free shipping threshold (does not show when threshold already reached)
